title: Paris left splits over awarding of city's marathon to Bolloré-linked company
subhed: The Cadence group – which notably includes Havas, owned by billionaire Vincent Bolloré – will organize the next four Paris marathons and half-marathons, the Paris City Council decided on Wednesday.

title: 'The very embodiment of terror': At the ICC, chilling account of crimes committed by Libyan prison official
subhed: Khaled Mohamed Ali El Hishri faces 17 counts of 'crimes against humanity and war crimes' allegedly committed against hundreds of detainees between 2014 and 2020 at a prison near Tripoli.

title: Heat wave in France illustrates temperature swings made more common by climate change
subhed: The unusual weather event France is experiencing highlights not only the early onset of high temperatures linked to climate change but also the increasing abruptness of weather shifts.

title: France remains top destination for foreign investment as Europe declines
subhed: France attracted the most foreign investment in Europe in 2025, according to the EY barometer published on Thursday, despite an overall decline in the number of projects and associated jobs across the continent.

title: Iran is considering taxing users of undersea cables in the Strait of Hormuz
